headline: Assessing Fortinet (FTNT) Valuation After Earnings Beat Guidance Hike And AI Security Push
summary: Why Fortinet's Earnings and AI Pivot Are Moving the Stock Fortinet (FTNT) has drawn fresh attention after strong quarterly earnings, higher full-year 2026 revenue guidance, and new AI-focused security products, all supporting its push as a converged security and networking platform. See our latest analysis for Fortinet. The recent earnings beat and AI product launches have come alongside sharp share price momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 66.45% and a year to date share price...
